hero_section.text:
Experience luxury beauty services in a relaxing atmosphere. Our professional team is dedicated to making you look and feel your best.

What sets us apart:

  • Professional staff with years of experience
  • Premium products from trusted brands
  • Personalized service tailored to you

our_services.subtitle: Professional Beauty Services
our_services.subtext: Comprehensive beauty services for all your needs. We offer a wide range of professional treatments tailored to you.
our_services.default: We offer a wide range of professional treatments

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Read their experiences
testimonials.text: We value our clients' feedback and are proud of the relationships we've built. Here's what they have to say about their experience with us.

testimonials.name: Jane Doe
testimonials.content: Amazing service! The staff is professional and friendly. I've been coming here for years.

testimonials.name: John Smith
testimonials.content: Best salon experience I've ever had! The attention to detail is incredible.

testimonials.name: Maria Garcia
testimonials.content: I love the atmosphere here. It's relaxing and the results are always perfect.

banner.title: Grand Opening
banner.content: 🎉 Grand Opening Special! 20% off all services this month.

team.title: Our Team
team.text:
Meet our talented professionals who are dedicated to providing you with exceptional service. Each team member brings years of experience and a passion for beauty.

Our team includes:

  • Master stylists with 10+ years of experience
  • Certified estheticians specializing in skincare
  • Expert colorists trained in the latest techniques

find_us.title: Call to schedule an appointment. Walk-ins are also accepted.

announcement_modal.title: ✨ New Braiding Classes at Crown of Beauty! ✨
announcement_modal.body: We're excited to announce that we're now offering braiding classes for all skill levels! Whether you're looking to master the basics or elevate your styling game, we've got a class for you:
announcement_modal.call_to_action: Interested? Call us to inquire about pricing and book your lessons today!
